project_type: Go backend panel with Vue.js frontends (VPN management panel)
build_system: go build, npm (vite) for frontends. deploy.sh for production deploy
test_framework: go test for backend, vitest for frontend
verification_instructions: 1. Run go build ./... to verify compilation. 2. Run go test ./... to verify all tests pass. 3. Run go vet ./... for static analysis.
environment_constraints: No database available for integration tests. Use static analysis and unit tests only.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing patterns in code.
key_patterns: Single large api.go (5976 lines) with all handlers. Helper functions at bottom. Package-per-concern in internal/. Deploy via deploy.sh with systemd. deploy-report.sh posts diagnostics as GitHub issues.
directory_structure: Root: deploy scripts, go.mod. panel/cmd/panel: main entry. panel/internal/: api, auth, bot, certrotation, config, csrf, db, email, gateway, health, notify, ratelimit, sessions, templates, totp. node/: separate agent binary. panel/web/admin/ and panel/web/portal/: Vue SPAs.
